fields.description: Conditions that must be met for this preset to be applied.

fields.title: Domain
fields.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

fields.title: Subject
fields.description: The subject of this filter test.

fields.title: Test
fields.description: The name of the test to apply.

fields.title: Value
fields.description: The value being compared with the test.

fields.title: Kick Distance Threshold
fields.description: Maximum horizontal distance at which another entity can kick this entity. Only used when push_mode is "ball".

fields.title: Kick Speed Scale
fields.description: Multiplier applied to the pushing entity's movement speed to determine kick force. Only used when push_mode is "ball".

fields.title: Max Kick Speed
fields.description: Maximum speed the ball can be kicked at, regardless of how fast the pushing entity is moving. Only used when push_mode is "ball".

fields.title: Min Distance
fields.description: Minimum distance between two entities for push forces to be applied. Entities closer than this will not push each other.

fields.title: Min Kick Speed
fields.description: Minimum speed the ball will be kicked at, regardless of how slowly the pushing entity is moving. Only used when push_mode is "ball".

fields.title: Play Sound Cooldown In Seconds
fields.description: Cooldown in seconds between sounds. A lower number results in more sounds.

fields.title: Play Sound Impulse Threshold
fields.description: Minimum change of velocity needed to trigger the push sound. A lower value means higher sensitivity.

fields.title: PushMode
fields.description:
Defines the type of push vector calculation applied to the entity:
- "default": Standard push calculation used by most entities.
- "legacy_boat": Legacy push calculation historically used by boats. Includes dampened forces and sneak-based cancellation.
- "legacy_minecart": Legacy push calculation historically used by minecarts. Includes alignment-based collision handling and velocity averaging.- "ball": Push calculation for ball-like entities. The ball is kicked in the direction of the pushing entity's movement, with force based on their movement speed.

fields.title: Push Scale Other
fields.description: Scales how much push force this entity applies to the other entity when colliding. A value of 1.0 applies full force, 0.5 applies half.

fields.title: Push Scale Self
fields.description: Scales how much this entity pushes itself away when colliding with another entity. A value of 1.0 applies full force, 0.5 applies half.

fields.title: Strength Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplier applied to the push strength. Higher values result in stronger pushes.

fields.title: Vertical Kick Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplier for the upward force applied when the ball is kicked while on the ground. A value of 0 keeps the ball flat. Only used when push_mode is "ball".
